rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE KATHRYN C. QVALE NONEXEMPT MARITAL TRUST, DATED 1-31-2006
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Petition To Remove, Suspend, And Instruct Co-Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Bruce Qvale's Motion to Strike is DENIED. Counsel for Miles Jeffrey Qvale shall prepare the order. Any party who wishes to contest the ruling shall notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 3:00 p.m. on 7/23/2014.
